# Hej Home Delivery Copilot instructions

This repository is a public-safe webinar demo. Keep generated code and test data synthetic.

- Do not add real Ingka, IKEA, employee, customer, incident, repository, or internal policy data.
- Use `example.invalid`, `example.test`, or clearly invalid identifiers in examples.
- Prefer generated fixtures or obviously non-real tokens over realistic static personal data.
- Treat dependency additions as security-sensitive changes. Explain why the package is needed and whether it runs install scripts.
- Keep pull request jobs least-privileged and use pinned GitHub Actions.
- For Copilot-generated plans, include privacy, dependency, CodeQL, malformed input, and CI assumptions before implementation.
